article_meta.title: President Donald Trump said Wednesday he wants negotiations to acquire Greenland, portraying the effort as a strategic n

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted Trump statements as author bias, misapplied bias types, and missed some author-prose framing. Only the broad Bias by Omission claim is defensible.
